name: Easy Pawn
description_short: EZPAWN at 2609 Murfreesboro Pike offers pawn loans, gold buying, and pre-owned merchandise sales in Nashville, TN.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with a location at 2609 Murfreesboro Pike in Nashville, Tennessee. As part of the broader EZPAWN family of stores, this location operates as a community-focused pawn shop serving customers who need quick cash or affordable pre-owned merchandise. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 9:00 am to 6:00 pm and is closed on Sundays.

The Nashville location offers a range of financial and retail services. Core offerings include pawn loans — collateral-based short-term loans where customers bring in items of value to receive cash — as well as outright purchase of gold, diamond jewelry, and firearms. On the retail side, EZPAWN sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25%–70% off new retail prices, covering electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, sneakers, and firearms. Customers can also use layaway (10% down, monthly payments) or third-party 'Take Today' financing to purchase items over time.

Several features set this location apart from a typical pawn shop. The store participates in the EZ+ Rewards Program, which awards points for pawning, redeeming, selling, or purchasing, and allows customers to manage pawns and layaways online and make payments remotely. An Instant Quote tool lets customers get an estimated value on electronics before visiting the store. This location also offers auto loans and has a dedicated firearms service with secure on-site storage. A Jewelry VIP Program provides guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning for enrolled members.

EZPAWN is a legitimate option for consumers who need fast cash without a credit check, or who want affordable pre-owned goods. However, pawn loans — like all short-term collateral loans — carry fees and terms that can be expensive relative to other borrowing options. The loan amount is limited by the assessed value of the item pawned, and failure to redeem on time results in forfeiture of the item. Consumers with access to credit unions or personal loan products should compare costs before pawning.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers earn points and manage pawns/layaways online with remote payment capability
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics values before visiting the store
Accepts a wide range of item categories: electronics, jewelry, gold, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, sneakers, and firearms
Sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25%–70% below new retail prices
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payment options
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
Offers firearms loans and purchases with secure on-site storage
cons: Pawn loans carry fees and conditions — full terms not disclosed on the website, requiring an in-store visit
Closed Sundays, limiting access for customers who need emergency cash on weekends
Loan amount is capped by item assessed value, which may be far below retail or sentimental value
Auto loans and 'Take Today' financing use third-party partners — terms and credit eligibility vary and are not detailed online
Not all services (including online payments) are available in all areas — store-specific availability applies
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash without a credit check and own items of value to use as collateral
Bargain hunters looking for brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25%–70% off retail
People looking to sell gold, diamond jewelry, or firearms for immediate cash
Customers who want to make layaway purchases on a tight budget with low upfront costs
diagnosis: EZPAWN Nashville is best for consumers who need same-day cash without a credit check and have electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to use as collateral. It also serves budget shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned goods at steep discounts. The main caveat is that pawn loan fees and terms are not disclosed online — borrowers should review the full cost of borrowing before committing, as pawn loans are typically more expensive than credit union alternatives.
services: Firearms loans, purchases, and secure on-site storage
Pre-owned merchandise retail sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, musical gear, handbags, sneakers)
Take Today third-party financing for purchases
EZ+ Rewards Program (points, online pawn/layaway management, remote payments)
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, cleaning)
Product Protection Plan for purchased merchandise
Online shop with daily new arrivals
